note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left buttock wound site, rates 5/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Stage 2 pressure ulcer Left buttock measures 4.0 cm x 2.2 cm x 0.3 cm.
  Wound bed: 38% slough, 62% granulation tissue. Periwound: macerated.
  Drainage: none. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Stage 2 pressure ulcer Left buttock — improving.
Plan: Foam dressing change daily. Nutritional consult ordered.
